case_title: EDWARD DUFFY VS. MICHAEL SCOTT PAGE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUFFY, EDWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAGE, MICHAEL SCOTT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 832 SUTTER STREET/GROUND FLOOR RETAIL SPACE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SEE SCANNED DOC
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUFFY, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT PAGE, MICHAEL SCOTT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ISSUANCE OF WRIT FOR POSSESSION/ $73.33 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUFFY, EDWARD
